## What happened

Describe the observed error, including the first actionable traceback or solver failure message.

## Canonical-path check

- [ ] I reproduced the issue after `pixi install --all`
- [ ] I can reproduce the issue on the canonical `osx-arm64` setup
- [ ] This issue only affects a best-effort / unsupported platform

## Additional context

Include anything else that may help maintainers reproduce the problem.
